# base-token-oracle

> x402-gated Base token forensics for agents: on-chain metadata, holder distribution, and security heuristics fused into a single deterministic paid call — purpose-built for autonomous trading bots.

Aggregates Blockscout data behind a pay-per-call HTTP surface. Every paid route is settled in USDC on Base via the x402 protocol.

## Paid Endpoints

- [Token Report](https://base-token-oracle.example.com/api/v1/x402/base/token/{address}/report): On-chain forensics for any Base ERC-20: name, symbol, supply, financials (market cap, exchange rate), verified status, deployer profile (balance, creation, activity), token activity metrics, holder count, top-10 concentration, and LP-lock heuristic. $0.01 USDC per call.

## Design Principles

1. **Agent-First:** Deterministic JSON, flat schemas, no conversational filler.
2. **Atomic Costs:** Clear pay-per-call pricing. No subscriptions.
3. **Low Latency:** Optimized for fast execution in bot loops.
